sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Baltic Horizon Fund publishes its NAV for March 2025
authors: Baltic Horizon Fund / Northern Horizon Capital
feed.summary: The net asset value ( NAV ) per unit of the Baltic Horizon Fund ( the Fund ) decreased to EUR 0.6769 at the end of March 2025 ( 0.6826 as of 28 February 2025 ) . The month-end total net asset value of the Fund was EUR 97.2 million ( EUR 98.0 million as of 28 February 2025 ) .
